title: All Wonders

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate with warm tones and minimal high-frequency emphasis.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I will praise with all my heart,
Among the faithful, I'll impart,
The works of God, both great and true,
His splendor shines in all He'll do.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In every deed, His hands reveal,
A love eternal, firm as steel.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hallelujah, His works declare,
A covenant strong, a love so rare.
Forever faithful, His name we trust,
Hallelujah, in Him, we must.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The wonder of His deeds proclaimed,
Mercy and grace are in His name.
He feeds the hungry, lifts the meek,
The hearts that break, His joy will seek.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: His hands of truth and justice reign,
A promise sealed, no love in vain.
A wisdom vast, a light so pure,
Through endless ages, it will endure.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hallelujah, His works declare,
A covenant strong, a love so rare.
Forever faithful, His name we trust,
Hallelujah, in Him, we must.

sections.label: Instrumental
lines: **Soft interlude to reflect on His wonders.**

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever faithful, His love will last,
A song of wonders through ages vast.
Hallelujah, our hearts will sing,
To the Lord, our everlasting King.

epigraph: Praise ye the LORD. I will praise the LORD with my whole heart
styleNote: Soft Fingerstyle Guitar · Warm Vocal Harmonies · Soft To Crescendo
